edition.title: Rost-AI passerar kritisk grans, HeyGen byter arkitektur

stories.headline: ElevenLabs lanserar 11.ai och Eleven v3 med emotionell rost
claims: 11.ai uses MCP protocol for workflow management
Eleven v3 provides emotional voice expression
11 Voices docuseries premiered at SXSW March 11
actions: Evaluate Eleven v3 for Flava voice integration upgrade

stories.headline: Rost-AI-marknaden for restauranger blir trangt
claims: New entrants: Vox, Loman, Incept AI, Palona AI, Maple, Revmo.ai since 2023
SoundHound expanding beyond drive-thru to call, text, in-car
Maple integrated with Shift4 SkyTab POS
actions: Monitor if any new entrant targets in-dining + taste profiling

stories.headline: Swiggy lanserar flersprakig rostbestallning i Indien
claims: Swiggy partnered with Sarvam AI for multilingual voice ordering
Covers food delivery, Instamart, and Dineout platforms

stories.headline: 68% av amerikanska konsumenter skurit ner restaurangbesoken
claims: 68% of US consumers cut restaurant spending in 2026
$90/week average spending, down from $115 in June 2025
97% of operators sharpening guest experience focus
predictions: Consumer spending pressure will continue through 2026
actions: Position Flava as revenue-per-visit optimizer for pressured operators

stories.headline: Svensk restaurangbransch 2026: digitalisering, upplevelse, hallbarhet
claims: 6 strong trends identified by Menigo for 2026
AI used for inventory, purchasing prediction, waste reduction
Plant-based moved from niche to premium segment
Frantzen Group opening Emberlin at Stureplan
Pontus Frithiof opening La Girafe in Uppsala

stories.headline: Hospitality Tech360 i London 30 mars
claims: Hospitality Tech360 at Excel London March 30-April 1 2026
Features PizzaExpress, Honest Burgers, Pizza Pilgrims
UK moving to API-first cloud-based systems

stories.headline: AI bygger dynamiska smakprofiler som uppdateras i realtid
claims: AI systems now analyze browsing behavior, dietary preferences, allergens, location, weather
Profiles are dynamic: spicy at night, light at lunch, comfort food on weekends
QR-linked loyalty apps provide AI recommendations to servers
predictions: Dynamic taste profiles will become standard in premium dining within 2 years

stories.headline: 15% av Gen Z anvander AI-chatbotar for att hitta matprodukter
claims: 15% of Gen Z use AI to research food products (SPINS 2026)
11% say AI chatbots are primary food discovery method
predictions: AI food discovery adoption will increase as tools improve

stories.headline: EU lanserar TraceMap: AI-plattform for livsmedelsakerhet
claims: EU Commission launched TraceMap on March 10 2026
Platform detects food fraud, traces contamination, speeds recalls
EU Regulation 1169/2011 requires 14-allergen declaration
actions: Monitor TraceMap for potential integration opportunities

stories.headline: HeyGen stanger Interactive Avatar 31 mars, LiveAvatar tar over
claims: Interactive Avatar sunset March 31 2026
LiveAvatar uses same Avatar IV quality
ElevenLabs V3 Voice Model supported in new API
HeyGen at $95M ARR, G2 fastest growing product
predictions: Migration must be completed by March 31
actions: URGENT: Migrate Flava HeyGen integration to LiveAvatar SDK

stories.headline: D-ID pivoterar till AI Agents 2.0, vinner CES 2026 Innovation Award
claims: D-ID pivoted from video tool to conversational AI platform
AI Agents 2.0: autonomous 24/7 digital assistants
Deployable on websites, mobile apps, kiosks
Won CES 2026 Innovation Award
predictions: D-ID will target restaurant kiosk market

stories.headline: Trivec fullt integrerat i Caspeco: en plattform, ett ekosystem
claims: Trivec became part of Caspeco in spring 2025
Single platform: POS, staffing, booking, analytics
Presence in Sweden, France, Belgium, Netherlands
~6500+ restaurants
actions: Continue Caspeco integration as 40% of MVP scope

stories.headline: Choice tar in $7,1M for europeiskt restaurang-OS
claims: Choice raised $7.1M Series A on March 16 2026
Prague-founded SaaS: ordering, payments, reservations, marketplace
1.5 million monthly orders across 9 CEE markets
Funding for AI modules and sales expansion
predictions: Choice will expand to Nordic markets within 12 months

stories.headline: Dynamic Yield utsedd till Gartner Leader for attonde aret i rad
claims: Named Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader 8th consecutive time in 2026
400+ brands using personalization
Restaurant application: drive-thru menu customization by time, weather, traffic

stories.headline: Taco Bells rost-AI hanterar miljontals ordrar, McDonald's satsar pa 2026
claims: Taco Bell voice AI processes millions of orders across hundreds of locations
8 seconds faster per order average
McDonald's ended IBM partnership June 2024, re-entering AI in 2026
Industry projection: 50% AI-handled drive-thru orders by end of 2026
predictions: 50% of US drive-thru orders AI-handled by end of 2026
actions: Use Taco Bell validation in Flava sales pitch

stories.headline: Adoption, inte funktioner, ar den verkliga barriaren
claims: Adoption, not features, is the real barrier to tech success
No executive expressed strong confidence in AI adoption
41% of FSR operators cite profitability as top goal
Operators moving toward unified technology ecosystems
actions: Leverage Flava's zero-install QR model as adoption answer

stories.headline: QR-bestallning ar standard 2026: 57% okar investeringarna
claims: 57% of companies increasing QR code investments in 2026
59% of smartphone users scan QR codes daily
Mr Yum and Meandu lack native POS integration
actions: Position Flava's POS-integrated QR as differentiator vs Mr Yum/Meandu
